children.name: Info Highlight Text
children.characters: Become part of a community that values green living and collaboration. Learn, share, and grow together in an environment that fosters sustainability and harmony with nature.

children.name: Most enterprises run three vendors for SAP, cloud, and AI and three blame games when something breaks. We’re all three, on one balance sheet.
children.characters: Most enterprises run three vendors for SAP, cloud, and AI and three blame games when something breaks. We’re all three, on one balance sheet.

children.name: SAP, the way Tier-1 firms run it.
children.characters: SAP, the way listed firms run it.

children.name: Greenfield, brownfield, hybrid S/4HANA. RISE and GROW with SAP. SuccessFactors, Concur, Ariba, BTP. 24×7 Enterprise Managed Services with 10,000+ users on cover. SAP Gold Partner.
children.characters: RISE for the enterprise. GROW in 12 weeks for the mid-market. AMS reimagined with AXIOM. Gold Partner. Rising Star 2022.

children.name: Migration factory. Well-Architected design. FinOps. Containers, serverless, data lakes. HANA-on-EC2. AWS Advanced Tier Partner with four AWS Competencies — DevOps, Generative AI, Supply Chain, and SAP.
children.characters: AWS Advanced Tier with four competencies. Google Cloud Partner with DataBridge. CloudLedger unifies bills, posture, and the 24×7 NOC.

children.name: 6 AI products. 6 operational gaps closed.
children.characters: AXIOM. Production AI, not PowerPoint AI.

children.name: Xpense, SupplierX, OrderX, Logystix, Manufex, AeonxIQ. Production-grade platforms for spend, procurement, distribution, logistics, manufacturing, and enterprise intelligence. SAP- integrated. Cloud-native. Audit-ready.
children.characters: A 5-level autonomy engine for SAP AMS. 70% of L1 tickets close themselves at Level 4. Customer holds the dial.
